top_signals.title: Gold Holds Decline as Traders Weigh Iran War Confusion
top_signals.summary: Gold held a decline as conflicting signals from the US and Iran cast doubt over a diplomatic resolution to the war, fanning concerns over inflation and prolonged trade disruptions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman Sachs Sees Strong Refining Profits Through 2026 Amid Fuel Supply Crunch
top_signals.summary: Tighter petroleum product supply resulting from the Strait of Hormuz crisis will keep refining margins significantly higher throughout 2026, Goldman Sachs has forecast, with diesel margins especially elevated, Reuters reported. The war in the Middle East has pushed refiners’ margins two to three times higher than the average for the period from 2013 to 2019, the investment bank’s commodity analysts said in a note this week. Diesel margins specifically are seen at between $19 and $26 per barrel higher than they were before March. “We…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Building a Better Ukraine Requires Accessibility Reforms
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian media offering insight into how Ukrainians themselves debate the issues shaping their country.American coverage often narrows the view to the battlefield — these pieces widen it, revealing the texture of daily life, politics, and public argument in a nation at war. The perspectives gathered here are varied, candid, and often surprising, together forming a more complete picture of Ukraine as it really is.Frontline and StrategyГазета— Gazeta

The post Building a Better Ukraine Requires Accessibility Reforms appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russian aircraft production surges as Putin pivots to drone war
top_signals.summary: With tanks and other conventional armor hitting limits, cheap and scalable unmanned systems have become one of the few areas of Russian industry still capable of rapid expansion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Gold edges higher on easing Treasury yields amid Mideast uncertainty  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea goes full steam ahead on nuclear-powered submarines
top_signals.summary: Seoul plans to launch its first boat in the mid-2030s and commission it in “the late 2030s,” the government proclaimed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Australian Mogami ships to have ‘core DNA’ of Japan versions, ADF chief says
top_signals.summary: The move could prove a boon for Japan's defense industry, as it would allow domestic firms to play crucial roles in the vessels' maintenance and repair throughout their lifespan.
